summary: Evaluator verified all 25 manifest hashes, re-ran both uninstall suites (sh 24/0; ps1 all-pass), confirmed genuine red->green (exactly the four new scenarios o/p/q/r failed pre-implementation), and adversarially probed destructive safety: managed keys deleted by exact key equality; a near-miss key (sdd-forge-mcp-custom), a user entry whose value references a managed name, and unknown top-level keys all survive; corrupt JSON left byte-identical (SHA-256) with notice and exit 0; per-client continuation works; absent dirs skipped without creation. Deletion targets precisely scoped (per-selected-name rm under INSTALL_ROOT/mcp, install-root guards refusing /, HOME, parent); genuine sh/ps1 parity via an identical Node one-liner. Verdict PASS with zero findings.
note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
